title: mostacillastrum oleraceum
intro: Mostacillastrum oleraceum, also known as the edible mostacillastrum or wild mustard, is a plant species that belongs to the Brassicaceae family and is native to South America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Mostacillastrum oleraceum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or infusions, and it is also used as a spice and edible green in some traditional dishes.
